summary: Comprehensive testing of Metal Sheet Locator app completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. 500 synthetic metal sheets generated on 30x30 grid, all search/filter/navigation features operational.
passed_tests: Backend: All 11 API endpoints working (health, generate-data, sheets, stats, map, filters, search, duplicates, path calculation)
Frontend: Stats panel displays correct totals (500 sheets, 13,096 stock, 409 active IoT, 91 inactive)
Frontend: 30x30 warehouse grid renders correctly with shelves and aisles
Frontend: Metal type filter dropdown shows all 7 types (Aluminum, Steel, Copper, etc.)
Frontend: Find duplicates finds 73 Steel sheets and displays them sorted by distance
Frontend: Path calculation shows correct step count (Manhattan distance)
Frontend: Worker position inputs update location correctly
Frontend: Search functionality finds sheets by ID and type
Frontend: Inventory table shows all 500 sheets with correct columns
Frontend: Navigate and View buttons in inventory table work
Frontend: Sheet details modal shows all attributes correctly
Frontend: Zoom controls work (zoom in, zoom out, reset)
Frontend: Legend displays correctly showing all cell types
Frontend: Grid cell clicking updates worker position
Integration: All frontend-backend API calls working correctly
